message:
fix(macos): implement real pids_holding_file, agent_mail_pids_all_stopped, and identify_lock_holder_via_proc

Previously these were no-op stubs on non-Linux platforms, which meant
auto_clear_db_blockers could never find processes holding the database
file on macOS — the root cause of persistent "db-lock" startup failures
on mac-mini-max.

- pids_holding_file: now uses `lsof -t -w` to find PIDs holding a file
- agent_mail_pids_all_stopped: now uses `ps -p` to check process liveness
- identify_lock_holder_via_proc: now delegates to pids_holding_file + ps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
